name: Chicken of the Caesar Wraps
recipeIngredient: 4 cups romaine lettuce, torn into bite-size pieces
12 oz Premium Albacore Tuna from The Sea Solid White, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear romaine lettuce into bite-size pieces and toss with Caesar salad dressing to coat.
2. Add the tuna, croutons, and Parmesan cheese to the tossed lettuce; mix well to combine.
3. Spoon the salad mixture onto each tortilla near one edge.
4. Roll up the tortillas starting with the edge nearest the salad, tucking in tightly.
5. Seal the end of the wrap with a small dollop of additional Caesar dressing.
6. Cut the wraps in half to serve.
